reference: Hello, this is Mrs. Shahid. I want to become pregnant. I have been married for ten years, but my prolactin level is thirty-six. When I take medications to reduce it, I become in very bad condition, which is why I had to stop the medication. Please guide me about injections for this problem.
text: Hello, this is Mrs. Shaheed. I want to become pregnant. I have been married for 10 years, but my prolactin level is 36. When I take medications to reduce it, I become in very bad condition, which is why I had to stop the medication. Please guide me about injections for this problem.
